case_title: BORELLI, FRANK A. vs. CARROZZI, STEPHEN et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CARROZZI, STEPHEN CARROZZI, ROSA AS IND
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORELLI, FRANK A. AS TO DEFENDANT CARROZZI, STEPHEN CARROZZI, ROSA AS IND DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORELLI, FRANK A. COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-15-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $130.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE JUL-07-1994, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORELLI, FRANK A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARROZZI, STEPHEN CARROZZI, ROSA AS IND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4704 MISSION ST. $13,412.45 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,412.45, LEASE FORFEITED

JUN 15, 1994 DEPT. #4 9:30AM C/C FOR TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT. 9:31AM PLAINTIFF WITNESS FRANK BORELLI S & E. EXHIBIT #1 3 DAY NOTICE FOR ID & EVIDENCE. EXHIBIT #2 POS OF 3 DAY NOTICE FOR ID & EVIDENCE. 9:34AM COURT FINDS JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF: RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF: 4704 MISSION ST. LEASE FORFEITED. RENTS & DAMAGES $13,412.45. COSTS PER COST BILL. PLAITIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN.
